channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service mem…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service members killed in the Middle East. And, Pete Hegseth is requesting billions from Congress to help with the rising cost of the war in Iran. n.pr/4pDfkDk
item.content:encoded: Trump will attend the dignified transfer of U.S. service members killed in the Middle East. And, Pete Hegseth is requesting billions from Congress to help with the rising cost of the war in Iran. n.pr/4pDfkDk

item.title: 【特集】 …そして、消え逝くキミ達と。 インタビュー 一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる 挫折を経験した7人がステ…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【特集】
…そして、消え逝くキミ達と。
インタビュー

一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる
挫折を経験した7人がステージに立つ理由
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/kiekimi

#キエキミ
item.content:encoded:
【特集】
…そして、消え逝くキミ達と。
インタビュー

一度壊れたからこそ強くなれる
挫折を経験した7人がステージに立つ理由
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/kiekimi

#キエキミ

item.title: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two months into President Trump's second term. His mother says her family has yet to receive justice. n.pr/4ffCfAV
item.content:encoded: Ruben Ray Martinez, 23, was fatally shot by an ICE agent two months into President Trump's second term. His mother says her family has yet to receive justice. n.pr/4ffCfAV

item.title: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one of the conflict's mediators, where a senior Iranian official held talks potentially aimed at reviving a collapsed ceasefire between the United States and Iran. n.pr/4ffTIJC
item.content:encoded: The attacks overshadowed diplomatic efforts in Pakistan, one of the conflict's mediators, where a senior Iranian official held talks potentially aimed at reviving a collapsed ceasefire between the United States and Iran. n.pr/4ffTIJC

item.title: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will meet this week to make recommendations on whether specialized pharmacies should be allowed to make some popular wellness peptides. n.pr/3RqRais
item.content:encoded: A panel of advisers to the Food and Drug Administration will meet this week to make recommendations on whether specialized pharmacies should be allowed to make some popular wellness peptides. n.pr/3RqRais

item.description:

ロックンローラーとしての矜持
▶️https://natalie.mu/music/news/681886?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

item.content:encoded:
【ライブレポート】
黒夢の真髄を示すアリーナライブ
「THE PERFECT DAYS TO DIE」

初日公演で清春＆人時が奏でた
ロックンローラーとしての矜持

item.description: Funding cuts and program changes required by President Trump's big budget law are forcing states to rethink bipartisan efforts to bring Medicaid into jails and prisons. n.pr/4fujAAo

item.title: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaign…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaigning more often this year than he did in the same period for 2018 and has already rallied for a dozen candidates in toss-up races. n.pr/4wgwedc
item.content:encoded: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaigning more often this year than he did in the same period for 2018 and has already rallied for a dozen candidates in toss-up races. n.pr/4wgwedc
